# Project Buildup History: Offline Inspection Capture Platform

- Repository: `offline-inspection-capture-platform`
- Category: `ops_platform`
- Subtype: `generic`
- Source: `project_buildup_2021_2025_daily_plan.csv`
## 2024-02-28 - Day 1: Problem discovery start

- Task summary: Started this one by sitting down and trying to understand what Offline Inspection Capture Platform should actually become. I did not rush into code yet. The main thing here was to write down the operational problem Offline Inspection Capture Platform is meant to solve and who feels the pain so the project had a decent base. I was still mostly figuring out the shape of it, so a lot of the day went into small notes and half clear ideas. A lot of the work here was really about workflow thinking, not just screens or files.
- Deliverable: By the end of the day I had problem brief written down in a rough way, which was enough to stop guessing and move into the next step. It was not super polished, just stable enough that I felt okay moving forward.
